Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 is on top of box_2; red box must not be pushed.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp; red box not pushed.

Precondition: box_1 is grasped; red box must not be pushed.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table; red box not pushed.

Precondition: box_1 is on the table; both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 top is unblocked; red box not pushed.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp; red box not pushed.
